name: Darkfall
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>落</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>お</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>とし<ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おお</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>穴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent Special Summons 2 or more face-up monsters at the same time: Send those monsters to the Graveyard, then send all monsters in the opponent's hand and Deck to the Graveyard that have the same name as the monsters sent to the Graveyard by this effect.
eff: When your opponent Special Summons 2 or more face-up monsters at the same time: Send those monsters to the Graveyard, then send all monsters in the opponent's hand and Deck to the Graveyard that have the same name as the monsters sent to the Graveyard by this effect.

action: Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
